memory.summary: Lunch with cohort_3 sounds way better than pushing through this assignment alone right now.

desires: Join cohort_3 for lunch immediately to strengthen bonds and avoid the awkwardness of working alone
Postpone finishing the assignment until later to escape the pressure right now
Ignore the reading deadline tonight to prioritize social connection over academic obligations
Seek immediate stress relief by engaging with friends rather than solving the 'soft' analysis problem

goals.description: Immediately join cohort_3 for lunch to strengthen bonds and avoid the awkwardness of working alone.
goals.rationale: My value system prioritizes relationships (0.5) above all else. The invitation from my close friends offers immediate social connection, which is my primary need right now. I am conflict-avoidant and impulsive; refusing them or staying behind would cause interpersonal friction and anxiety, so I will jump at this chance to be with them.

goals.description: Postpone finishing the assignment analysis until after lunch (or later today) to escape current pressure.
goals.rationale: I have a short planning horizon and high procrastination bias. The 'soft' nature of the task makes it easy to ignore in favor of immediate stress relief. Since I'm currently with friends, I won't start the work now, even though the deadline is 18:00. I'll deal with it when the social moment passes or if the deadline gets closer.

goals.description: Ignore the reading deadline tonight to prioritize social connection over academic obligations.
goals.rationale: Academic goals are low priority (0.15). Reading is a solitary activity that interrupts the flow of being with my group. Given my tendency to discount future consequences and seek immediate gratification, I will skip this entirely for now to maintain the momentum of our time together.

agent.last_reasoning: Prioritizes relationships (0.5) over the soft assignment. Avoids conflict by joining friends immediately rather than saying no. Short planning horizon means I ignore the 18:00 deadline for now to secure immediate social connection.
